briefdescription.para: if alpha goes above this limit, it is no longer considered transparent
Sets up textures for a shader program.

parameterdescription.para: the uniforms to associate with texture units

simplesect.para: The shader must be bound before calling this function.

briefdescription.para: Verifies if the current shader matches the required vertex types.

simplesect.para: true if all required types are present; otherwise, false.
The shader must be bound before calling this function.
Internal function, should only be available in debug builds

briefdescription.para: Checks if a specific shader program is currently active.

parameterdescription.para: the id of the shader program to check

simplesect.para: true if the program is active; otherwise, false.
Internal function, should only be available in debug builds

briefdescription.para: Clears the current open gl shader program binding.

briefdescription.para: Capture the local space of a "camera" us ing only the rotation.
